Why I decided to make GLADIADOOR

I decided to make GLADIADOOR because I wanted to make a game people would enjoy.

I've always enjoyed medieval style games like Skyrim and Blade & Sorcery.

Thats what led me to make GLADIADOOR. The game is a mix of medieval fighters and arena fighters.
